title: oberonia acaulis var. acaulis
intro: Oberonia acaulis var. acaulis, also known as the "Terrestrial Oberonia", is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia acaulis var. acaulis include its potential to aid in reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by drying its roots and leaves, which are then used in teas, infusions, and other traditional remedies.
